# tree-sitter-language-pack

> A Rust core that bundles 306 tree-sitter grammars behind one parsing and code-intelligence API, with native bindings for Python, TypeScript / Node.js, Rust, Go, Java, C#, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, and WebAssembly, plus the `ts-pack` CLI. Parsers download on demand and cache locally.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/getting-started/installation/): Install for Python, TypeScript, Rust, Go, Java, C#, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, WebAssembly, or the `ts-pack` CLI.
- [Quick Start](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/getting-started/quickstart/): Parse your first file and run code intelligence in minutes.

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/architecture/): Rust core with polyglot bindings — where each binding lives and how it reaches Rust.
- [Download Model](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/download-model/): How parsers are fetched on demand, cached locally, and reused across runs.
- [Code Intelligence](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/concepts/code-intelligence/): Structure, imports, exports, comments, symbols, and chunking pipeline.

## Guides

- [Parsing Code](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/parsing/): Build syntax trees, choose a language, walk nodes, recover from errors.
- [Code Intelligence](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/intelligence/): Extract structure, imports, exports, comments, docstrings.
- [Chunking for LLMs](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/chunking/): Split source at natural boundaries for embeddings and prompt windows.
- [Configuration](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/configuration/): `PackConfig` and `ProcessConfig` options.
- [Extraction Queries](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/extraction/): Tree-sitter queries for custom extractors.
- [Building from Source](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/building/): Compile the Rust core and bindings locally.
- [Docker](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/docker/): Container image with `ts-pack` and the parser cache pre-populated.
- [Performance & Benchmarks](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/performance/): Throughput characteristics and tuning.

## CLI

- [CLI Usage](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/guides/cli/): `ts-pack` command-line reference (`download`, `parse`, `process`, `list`).

## API Reference

- [Python API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-python/): Python binding reference.
- [TypeScript / Node.js API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-typescript/): Node.js native-addon binding reference.
- [Rust API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-rust/): Rust core library reference.
- [Go API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-go/): Go module reference (cgo).
- [Java API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-java/): Java binding reference (Foreign Function & Memory).
- [C# API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-csharp/): C# / .NET binding reference (P/Invoke).
- [Ruby API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-ruby/): Ruby binding reference (Magnus).
- [PHP API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-php/): PHP extension reference (ext-php-rs).
- [Elixir API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-elixir/): Elixir binding reference (Rustler NIF).
- [WebAssembly API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-wasm/): WebAssembly binding reference.
- [C / FFI API](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/api-c/): C FFI surface (header + shared library).
- [Configuration Reference](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/configuration/): Full configuration options.
- [Types](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/types/): Type definitions across bindings.
- [Errors](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/reference/errors/): Error categories and handling patterns.
- [Supported Languages](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/languages/): The full list of 306 supported grammars.

## Ecosystem

Part of the [kreuzberg.dev](https://kreuzberg.dev) family of Rust-core, polyglot-bindings libraries:

- [Kreuzberg](https://docs.kreuzberg.dev/) — Document intelligence: PDF, Office, images, HTML, email, with OCR. Consumes tree-sitter-language-pack for code-intelligence extraction from source files.
- [Kreuzberg Cloud](https://docs.kreuzberg.cloud/) — Managed document extraction API.
- [html-to-markdown](https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev/) — Fast HTML to Markdown conversion.
- [kreuzcrawl](https://docs.kreuzcrawl.kreuzberg.dev/) — Polite, resumable web crawler.
- [liter-llm](https://docs.liter-llm.kreuzberg.dev/) — Universal LLM API client.

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/CHANGELOG/): Release history.
- [Contributing](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/contributing/): Contribution guidelines.
- [CI / CD](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.kreuzberg.dev/contributing/ci/): Build, test, and release pipelines.
